heading: Service of process
label: 70110 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7011036:5604., , .Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII, § 1804110 Stat. 2761The words “each State in which it is incorporated” are substituted for “the State of Delaware” for consistency in the revised title.
